signals.headline: Latest price movements (as of April 22, 9:15 AM ET):** Ethereum up ~4% day-over-day to $2,403
signals.raw: Latest price movements (as of April 22, 9:15 AM ET):** Ethereum up ~4% day-over-day to $2,403.78 (from $2,305.04 on April 21); Bitcoin up to $78,194.[1][3] These reflect routine volatility, not tied to new confirmations—ETH remains in a $1,755–$2,405 consolidation channel amid waning ETF outflows ($77M lost in March).[4]
